# Synthetic Junos display-set sample with apply-groups and no inheritance context.
[USER_1]@[HOST_1]> show configuration | display set | no-more
set system host-name [HOST_1]
set system apply-groups [GROUP_1]
set system syslog host [IP_1] any any
set groups [GROUP_1] system services ssh
set groups [GROUP_1] system login idle-timeout 10
set groups [GROUP_1] snmp community [COMMUNITY_1] authorization read-only

[USER_1]@[HOST_1]>
